summary: Update mode testing complete. Verified UI cleanup features: 1) Quick Dice panel visible on all GM tabs including Loot, 2) All 9 GM Screen tabs functional, 3) Most components use gold colors (#F59E0B) instead of green. BUG FOUND: LootGenerator.js still has green color (rgba(34, 197, 94)) on Magic Items section styling (lines 494-497). Font consistency verified - Cinzel for headers, Montserrat for body text.

quick_dice_on_loot_tab.title: Quick Dice panel visible on Loot tab
quick_dice_on_loot_tab.details: Quick Dice panel is persistent across all GM Screen tabs including Loot
quick_dice_on_loot_tab.evidence: Test 'Quick Dice panel is visible on Loot tab' passed

loot_generator_gold_colors.title: Loot Generator uses gold colors for main elements
loot_generator_gold_colors.details: Generate Loot button and tier selectors use gold (#F59E0B). However, Magic Items section still uses green (rgba(34, 197, 94)) in lines 494-497
loot_generator_gold_colors.evidence: Visual inspection confirmed gold buttons; grep found green remnants in Magic Items styling

gm_screen_9_tabs.title: All 9 GM Screen tabs functional
gm_screen_9_tabs.details: Combat, Location, NPCs, Monsters, Tables, Loot, Dice, Party, Notes all load correct content
gm_screen_9_tabs.evidence: Test 'All 9 GM Screen tabs are visible and clickable' + 'Each tab loads content' passed

font_consistency.title: Cinzel for headers, Montserrat for body text
font_consistency.details: GMScreen.js uses Cinzel for h1/h2/h3 headers. LootGenerator.js uses Montserrat for body text labels
font_consistency.evidence: grep confirmed font-family patterns in both files

issues.description: LootGenerator.js Magic Items section still uses green color (rgba(34, 197, 94)) instead of gold. Found at lines 494-497.
issues.reproduction: 1. Login and go to GM Screen, 2. Click Loot tab, 3. Select Legendary tier, 4. Generate loot multiple times until Magic Items appear, 5. Magic Items card background is greenish instead of gold
issues.affected_test: Visual inspection - not blocking tests but inconsistent with gold theme

issues.description: Several other components still have green (rgba(34, 197, 94)) remnants: PartyInventory.js, LocationsTab.js, EncounterGeneratorTab.js, CombatCreatorTab.js, NPCsTab.js, PlayersTab.js. These should be replaced with gold (#F59E0B) for full consistency.

action_items: Replace rgba(34, 197, 94) with rgba(245, 158, 11) (gold) in LootGenerator.js lines 494-497
Consider replacing green remnants in other components (PartyInventory.js, LocationsTab.js, etc.) for full UI consistency
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI cleanup mostly complete. Quick Dice panel persistent across all tabs. Gold colors (#F59E0B) applied to most GM components. Font consistency verified (Cinzel/Montserrat). Minor issue: LootGenerator.js Magic Items section still has green styling that should be gold. Test credentials: lcblakey24@outlook.com / LCBlakey24?!
